original_text: Total nonfarm payroll employment increased by 172,000 in May, and the unemployment rate was unchanged at 4.3 percent.
modified_text: May 2026 brought broad-based job gains, with employment rising 172,000 across essentially every major industry, the BLS reported.
claim: U.S. payrolls rose 172,000 in May 2026, with gains spread across essentially every major industry.
notes: The headline figure (+172,000, May 2026) is correct and not contradicted, but 'across essentially every major industry' generalizes beyond what the cited sentence supports (the release attributes gains to specific sectors, not all). Over-generalization without contradicting the number -> partially_supported.
